topStories.title: US Deploys B-2 Bombers For Operation Against Iran
topStories.description: The United States Central Command (CENTCOM) on Friday said B-2 stealth bombers have taken off to carry out a mission as part of Operation Epic Fury, aimed at "eliminating threats" posed by the Iranian...

topStories.title: US offers $10 million reward for information on Mojtaba Khamenei, key Iranian leaders
topStories.description: The announcement targets key Iranian figures, including Mojtaba Khamenei, Ali Larijani, Maj. Gen. Yahya Rahim Safavi, and others amid heightened Middle East tensions following US and Israeli strikes.

topStories.title: US Sending 2,500 Marines To Middle East As Iran War Intensifies
topStories.description: About 2,500 US Marines are being deployed to the Middle East as American and Israeli strikes keep pounding Iran and the Islamic Republic keeps attacking Persian Gulf shipping and energy...

topStories.title: Opposition leaders press government, Lok Sabha Speaker to revoke the suspension of 8 MPs
topStories.description: The eight MPs, including seven from the Congress, have been barred from attending the remainder of the Budget Session

topStories.title: ‘You don’t need to worry about it’: Pete Hegseth on Iran's Hormuz shipping threat
topStories.description: The Strait of Hormuz has come under global focus as tensions rise following joint strikes by United States and Israel on Iran. Commercial ships in the strait and the Persian Gulf have recently faced missile and drone attack risks linked to Iran.

topStories.title: ‘Improper purpose’: US federal judge quashes subpoenas against Jerome Powell, says 'govt tried to pressure on rates'
topStories.description: The Judge wrote that evidence suggests that the government served the subpoenas ‘on the Board to pressure its Chair into voting for lower interest rates or resigning’

topStories.title: Cuba confirms talks with Trump officials; President Miguel Diaz-Canel seeks solutions amid severe energy crisis
topStories.description: Oil shipments from Venezuela to Cuba were halted after the United States attacked Venezuela and arrested President Nicolás Maduro, deepening Cuba’s energy crisis.

topStories.title: Menstrual leave law not in women’s best interest: SC
topStories.description: The Supreme Court declined to mandate menstrual leave, citing potential job market issues, and urged the government to consider a uniform policy.

topStories.title: US Offers $10 Million Reward For Information On Mojtaba Khamenei, Ali Larijani, Top Irania
topStories.description: Reward announced hours after these leaders attended al-Quds demonstrations in Iran

topStories.title: Haryana Rajya Sabha polls: Congress MLAs reach Himachal Pradesh to prevent cross-voting
topStories.description: After CLP meet, about 30 MLAs leave for Shimla; party insiders say the move is meant to keep the flock together ahead of three-cornered election; Congress holds 37 seats and needs 31 votes to send its candidate

dailyNews.title: Brazil’s jailed ex-President Jair Bolsonaro hospitalised with bronchopneumonia; condition serious
dailyNews.description: The 70-year-old was taken to the hospital early Friday (March 13) after experiencing high fever, chills and a drop in oxygen saturation, doctors said.

dailyNews.title: Sheriff in Nancy Guthrie case believes they know kidnapper's motive
dailyNews.description: The 84-year-old mother of US TV presenter Savannah Guthrie was kidnapped 41 days ago.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine and allies fear easing Russian sanctions will prolong war
dailyNews.description: Ukraine's president says the US decision "certainly does not help achieve peace".

dailyNews.title: Iran’s arsenal power crushed? US Defence Secy Pete Hegseth claims ‘missiles down 90%, drones down 95%’
dailyNews.description: Speaking at a Pentagon press conference, Hegseth said: “Iran has no air defenses. Iran has no air force. Iran has no navy. Their missiles, their missile launchers and drones are being destroyed…”

dailyNews.title: Chipotle announces BOGO burritos on Friday, 13 March, in US. But here's the catch to avail the offer — details here
dailyNews.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill is offering a limited-time BOGO deal on March 13, from 3-4 p.m. Customers must show a tattoo to redeem the offer, which allows one free item for every purchased entrée of equal or higher value, capped at five items per bill.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi's big Kanshi Ram claim in UP Dalit outreach: 'Nehru would've made him Congress CM'
dailyNews.description: BSP under Kanshi Ram's protege, ex-CM Mayawati has tense relationship with Congress and SP, which are focusing on social justice agenda ahead of assembly polls

dailyNews.title: All six crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
dailyNews.description: The US Central Command says all six crew members died after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

dailyNews.title: Cuba says it will release 51 prisoners in the coming days
dailyNews.description: Havana says it is in talks with Washington as no fuel has entered the island in three months.

dailyNews.title: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth claims Iran’s new Supreme Leader ‘likely wounded and disfigured’
dailyNews.description: Hegseth criticized Khamenei’s first statement for being written rather than delivered via video or audio and said there was no proof of his condition.

dailyNews.title: Dem senators in the hot seat as Republicans rip their DHS vote amid terror threats: 'Under attack'
dailyNews.description: Democrats content that Republicans rejected an offer from Sen. Schiff's to spare disaster response agency from an ongoing government shutdown on Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Charges dropped against teens after teacher dies in senior prank incident outside his home
dailyNews.description: Charges were dropped against teens involved in a teacher's death during a toilet paper prank. The family of the victim chose forgiveness over prosecution in the heartbreaking case.

dailyNews.title: Nine convicted in North Texas ICE attack as Kash Patel issues warning to those who target federal officers
dailyNews.description: Mixed verdict delivered in federal trial of nine people accused of 2025 ICE facility attack in Texas, with convictions on terrorism and explosives charges.

topStories.title: Vice President JD Vance was skeptical of first Iran strikes, Politico reports
topStories.description: New reporting from Politico says Vice President JD Vance was hesitant to strike Iran. Political strategists Bryan Lanza and Mo Elleithee join "The Takeout" to discuss what it means for Vance's relationship with President Trump and how it could impact the 2028 race.

topStories.description: Matt Floca will be the new CEO and executive director of the Kennedy Center, President Trump announced.

dailyNews.description: President Miguel Díaz-Canel, whose country is rapidly running out of fuel, said the talks were based on “respect for the political systems of both countries.”

dailyNews.title: His Harvard Lab Was Thriving. Then Came the Cuts.
dailyNews.description: Will Mair, who studies aging, lost almost all his research funds when the White House cracked down on Harvard. He was wholly unprepared for the upheaval that followed.

dailyNews.title: When a President Gets Addicted to Regime Change
dailyNews.description: Venezuela gave Trump a taste of success. This isn’t the first time an American president has gotten hooked on overthrowing foreign governments.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump can't 'drill, baby, drill' his way out of this Iran-inspired oil crisis: Experts
dailyNews.description: Oil prices have skyrocketed in the days since President Donald Trump's war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: Oil closes above $100 for second day as market shrugs off U.S. measures to reduce prices during Iran war
dailyNews.description: Traders are continuing to monitor developments in the Middle East. Overnight, Trump hinted that an end to the conflict was not imminent.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Refunds to companies should go to workers as bonuses, raises, Greer says
dailyNews.description: The United States government could end up paying $165 billion of more in refunds for Trump's IEEPA tariffs that the Supreme Court ruled were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: 2,200 Marines headed to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israel strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
